_note: This file is the only hand-curated config for pz-vote. Everything else (labels, enum options, defaults, nested Lua table paths) is derived at runtime from game files in reference/game_files/. This file exists for four reasons: (1) curation — only ~90 of ~180+ sandbox keys are shown; (2) Sandbox.json name mismatches — the Lua preset keys don't always match the Sandbox_<Key> pattern; (3) ini settings — server.ini fields have no game-file source; (4) B42-new keys — a few keys added in B42 are absent from Apocalypse.lua and need explicit type/default here.

sandboxKeyMap._note: Maps Lua preset key names → Sandbox.json lookup key (without the 'Sandbox_' prefix). Needed because some Lua keys don't match the Sandbox_<LuaKey> convention. Rule: for a key 'Foo' in a .lua preset, the tool looks up 'Sandbox_Foo' in Sandbox.json. These overrides redirect that lookup. ZombieLore keys all have a 'Z' prefix in Sandbox.json (Speed → ZSpeed, etc.). Population keys use longer names (Zombies → ZombieCount). Basement key lives under a nested table but looks up via BasementSpawnFrequency.

annotations._note: Explicit type/default overrides for keys that are missing from Apocalypse.lua (B42-new) or whose type can't be reliably detected. Without these, detectType() would fall through to 'number'. All enum options here confirmed in-game unless noted otherwise.

UndergroundDarkness._note: B42 basement darkness. Enum, 3 levels. Not in any preset .lua file. Options from in-game observation — Sandbox.json has no _option* for this key.

CraftingYieldMultiplier._note: B42 crafting yield multiplier. Float. Absent from Apocalypse.lua.

OreSpawnMultiplier._note: B42 ore spawn multiplier. Float. Absent from Apocalypse.lua.

BlacksmithingEnabled._note: B42 blacksmithing toggle. Bool. Absent from Apocalypse.lua.

PotteryEnabled._note: B42 pottery toggle. Bool. Absent from Apocalypse.lua.

StartDay._note: 1–31 dropdown in-game (1_time_2.png). Sandbox.json has no _option* entries. Rendered as number input — 31-item dropdown is poor UX for voting.

WaterShutModifier._note: World 'Water Shutoff' day offset. Number input in-game (4_world_1.png, value 14). Distinct from WaterShut (the distribution enum). Sandbox.json has no entry for this key.

ElecShutModifier._note: World 'Electricity Shutoff' day offset. Number input in-game (4_world_1.png, value 14). Distinct from ElecShut (distribution enum). Sandbox.json has no entry for this key.

FridgeFactor._note: World 'Refrigeration Effectiveness'. Dropdown confirmed in-game (4_world_2.png). Sandbox.json has no _option* entries.

Alarm._note: World 'House Alarms Frequency'. Dropdown confirmed in-game (4_world_3.png). Sandbox.json has no entry for this key. No 'Always' at top end.

LockedHouses._note: World 'Locked Houses Frequency'. Dropdown confirmed in-game (4_world_3.png). Same 6-slot scale as Alarm. Sandbox.json has no entry for this key.

FuelStationGasMin._note: World 'Initial Minimum Gas Pump Amount'. Dropdown confirmed in-game (4_world_4.png). Sandbox.json has a title but no _option* entries. 9-slot scale shared with FuelStationGasMax.

FuelStationGasMax._note: World 'Initial Maximum Gas Pump Amount'. Dropdown confirmed in-game (4_world_5.png). Same 9-slot scale as FuelStationGasMin.

Temperature._note: Nature 'Temperature'. Dropdown confirmed in-game (5_nature_2.png). Sandbox.json has no entry for this key.

Rain._note: Nature 'Rain'. Dropdown confirmed in-game (5_nature_3.png). Sandbox.json has no entry for this key.

FishAbundance._note: Nature 'Fishing Abundance'. Dropdown confirmed in-game (5_nature_4.png). Sandbox.json has no entry for this key.

NatureAbundance._note: Nature 'Nature's Abundance'. Dropdown confirmed in-game (5_nature_5.png). Same 5-slot scale as FishAbundance. Sandbox.json has no entry for this key.

Farming._note: Nature 'Farming Speed' (Sandbox.json: Agriculture Multiplier). Float number input in-game (5_nature_1.png, value 1.0). No Sandbox.json _option* entries.

PlantAbundance._note: Nature 'Farming Abundance'. Float number input in-game (5_nature_1.png, value 1.0). No Sandbox.json _option* entries.

Helicopter._note: Meta 'Helicopter'. Dropdown confirmed in-game (6_meta_2.png). Sandbox.json has a title but no _option* entries.

MetaEvent._note: Meta 'Meta Event'. Dropdown confirmed in-game (6_meta_3.png). 3 options only — no 'Once'. Sandbox.json has a title but no _option* entries.

StatsDecrease._note: Character 'Stats Decrease'. Dropdown confirmed in-game (7_character_4.png). Sandbox.json has no entry for this key.

EndRegen._note: Character 'Endurance Regeneration'. Dropdown confirmed in-game (7_character_5.png). Same 5-slot scale as StatsDecrease. Sandbox.json has no entry for this key.

CharacterFreePoints._note: Character 'Free Trait Points'. Number input in-game (7_character_1.png, value 0). Sandbox.json has a title but no _option* entries.

CarAlarm._note: Vehicles 'Vehicle Alarms Frequency'. Dropdown confirmed in-game (8_vehicles_2.png). Sandbox.json has no entry for this key.

PopulationMultiplier._note: Zombie advanced 'Population Multiplier'. Dropdown confirmed in-game (2_zombie_4.png). 7 options incl. Insane and Custom. Sandbox.json has no _option* entries.

PopulationStartMultiplier._note: Zombie advanced 'Population Start Multiplier'. Dropdown confirmed in-game (2_zombie_5.png). Same 7-slot scale as PopulationMultiplier.

PopulationPeakMultiplier._note: Zombie advanced 'Population Peak Multiplier'. Dropdown confirmed in-game (2_zombie_6.png). Same 7-slot scale. Apocalypse default is 'High' = index 3.

PopulationPeakDay._note: Zombie advanced 'Population Peak Day'. Number input in-game (2_zombie_2.png, value 28).

RedistributeHours._note: Advanced zombie setting. ZombieConfig in Lua. Default from Apocalypse.lua.

FollowSoundDistance._note: Advanced zombie setting. ZombieConfig in Lua. Default from Apocalypse.lua.

RallyGroupSize._note: Advanced zombie setting. ZombieConfig in Lua. Default from Apocalypse.lua.

RallyGroupSizeVariance._note: Advanced zombie setting. ZombieConfig in Lua. Default from Apocalypse.lua.

RallyTravelDistance._note: Advanced zombie setting. ZombieConfig in Lua. Default from Apocalypse.lua.

RallyGroupSeparation._note: Advanced zombie setting. ZombieConfig in Lua. Default from Apocalypse.lua.

RallyGroupRadius._note: Advanced zombie setting. ZombieConfig in Lua. Default from Apocalypse.lua.

AnimalStatsModifier._note: Livestock 'Stats Reduction Speed'. Dropdown confirmed in-game (9_livestock_3.png): Ultra Fast→Very Slow. Sandbox.json has no _option* entries.

AnimalPregnancyTime._note: Livestock 'Pregnancy Time'. Dropdown confirmed in-game (9_livestock_4.png). Same 6-slot scale as AnimalStatsModifier. Sandbox.json has no _option* entries.

AnimalEggHatch._note: Livestock 'Egg Hatch Time'. Dropdown confirmed in-game (9_livestock_4.png). Same 6-slot scale.

AnimalAgeModifier._note: Livestock 'Aging Modifier Speed'. Dropdown confirmed in-game (9_livestock_4.png). Same 6-slot scale. Sandbox.json had only 3 options (Very Fast/Fast/Normal) — those were wrong/incomplete. ⚠️ Checklist flags that Apocalypse default (index 4) may mean Slow on this scale — verify against live SandboxVars.lua.

AnimalMilkIncModifier._note: Livestock 'Milk Increase Speed'. Dropdown confirmed in-game (9_livestock_4.png). Same 6-slot scale.

AnimalWoolIncModifier._note: Livestock 'Wool Increase Speed'. Dropdown confirmed in-game (9_livestock_4.png). Same 6-slot scale.

AnimalGrassRegrowTime._note: Livestock 'Grass Regrowth time'. Number input in-game (9_livestock_1.png). Def=240 in Apocalypse.lua.

AnimalTrackChance._note: Livestock 'Animal Tracks Chance'. Dropdown confirmed in-game (9_livestock_5.png). 6 options — no 'Always' (unlike AnimalRanchChance which has 7). Sandbox.json has no _option* entries.

AnimalPathChance._note: Livestock 'Animal Paths Chance'. Dropdown confirmed in-game (9_livestock_5.png). Same 6-slot scale as AnimalTrackChance.

ini._note: Server.ini settings. These are multiplayer server config values written to the server's .ini file — NOT part of SandboxVars.lua. They have no game-file source, so type/label/default must be fully defined here. The tool writes these to a separate ini section of its output. These are the settings players on a server vote about that aren't sandbox settings.

groups.label: PVP & Safety
groups._note: Core PvP toggles. PVP=1 means player-vs-player damage is on. SafetySystem gives players a toggle to flag themselves as non-hostile.

groups.label: Sleep
groups._note: Multiplayer sleep is off by default — sleeping in MP is complex because all players must sleep simultaneously for time to pass. SleepAllowed lets players attempt it; SleepNeeded makes fatigue actually require sleeping.

groups.label: Safehouses
groups._note: Safehouses let players claim a building as protected. Off by default. The days-to-claim gate prevents claiming on day 1.

groups.label: Server
groups._note: Core server parameters. HoursForLootRespawn=0 means loot never respawns — appropriate for a hardcore/persistent server. This is distinct from the sandbox loot settings.

sandbox._note: Sandbox setting groups. Each group lists Lua key names to include. Defaults, labels, and enum options are looked up from Sandbox.json + Apocalypse.lua at runtime — only exceptions (sandboxKeyMap, annotations) need to be listed above. Keys not listed here are silently excluded from the UI. Groups marked b42:true are hidden unless the user enables B42 mode.

groups.label: World Timeline
groups._note: Time-related world settings. Corresponds to the 'Time' tab in-game (tab 1). WaterShutModifier/ElecShutModifier are the specific day offsets; WaterShut/ElecShut are the distribution (e.g. 'within X days' enum). These 4 together control when utilities shut off.

groups.label: Zombie Population
groups._note: Zombie count and distribution. Corresponds to the top of the 'Zombie' tab (tab 2). These keys live under ZombieConfig in the Lua output — sandboxKeyMap handles the Zombies/Distribution name mismatches. PopulationMultiplier and friends are float multipliers on the base count.

groups.label: Zombie Lore
groups._note: Zombie behavior/attributes. Corresponds to the middle of the 'Zombie' tab. IMPORTANT: luaTableHint is required here because 'Strength' appears in BOTH ZombieLore AND MultiplierConfig in the preset files. Without the hint, buildSchema would use the MultiplierConfig value (last-wins in the parse loop). The hint forces lookup of ZombieLore.Strength specifically. All sandboxKeyMap entries in this group (Speed, Strength, etc.) have Z-prefixed Sandbox.json lookup keys.

groups.label: Zombie Respawn
groups._note: Controls whether and how fast zombies respawn. Under ZombieConfig in Lua. ZombieRespawn is the top-level preset dropdown (High/Normal/Low/None, has Sandbox.json options); RespawnHours/UnseenHours/Multiplier are advanced numeric fields shown below it in-game (2_zombie_2.png). These are DISTINCT controls — ZombieRespawn sets a named tier, the number fields give fine-grained control.

groups.label: Loot Rarity
groups._note: All loot category rarity multipliers. Corresponds to the 'Loot' tab in-game (tab 3). These are float values in the preset files but the tool renders them as named dropdowns (Insane Rare → Abundant) snapped to the 6 factor values from Apocalypse.lua. SkillBookLoot and RecipeResourceLoot intentionally use the old key names — their Sandbox.json entries don't follow the *LootNew pattern.

groups.label: Character & Survival
groups._note: Character difficulty and combat settings. Corresponds to the 'Character' tab (tab 7). 'Global' is the XP multiplier (under MultiplierConfig in Lua). CharacterFreePoints is the free skill points at character creation.

groups.label: Environment
groups._note: Climate and world-age settings. Corresponds to parts of the 'World' tab (tab 4). TimeSinceApo controls how long the apocalypse has been going — affects world erosion state at game start.

groups.label: Farming & Nature
groups._note: Farming productivity and nature abundance. Corresponds to the 'Nature' tab (tab 5). FoodRotSpeed and FridgeFactor affect how long food lasts — kept here (not with loot) because they're shown in the Nature tab in-game.

groups.label: Meta Events
groups._note: Random events and world encounter settings. Corresponds to the 'Meta' tab (tab 6). Helicopter events, radio broadcasts, generator spawning, annotated map chance, house alarms, and locked house frequency.

groups.label: Vehicles
groups._note: Vehicle spawning and condition settings. Corresponds to the 'Vehicles' tab (tab 8). FuelStationGasMin/Max are floats (0.0–1.0 proportion). CarGasConsumption is a multiplier. TrafficJam is a bool that spawns abandoned car pileups.

groups.label: Corpses & Blood
groups._note: Body persistence and visual gore settings. HoursForCorpseRemoval=0 means corpses never auto-remove. DecayingCorpseHealthImpact affects the sickness hazard from nearby rotting bodies.

groups.label: Misc & Display
groups._note: Miscellaneous settings that don't fit other categories. AllowMiniMap/AllowWorldMap/MapAllKnown are under the Map nested table in Lua output. StarterKit gives new characters a basic item loadout. Nutrition enables the macro-tracking system.

groups.label: Animals & Livestock
groups._note: B42 animal husbandry settings. Full field inventory from 9_livestock_1.png. AnimalRanchChance + AnimalAgeModifier have Sandbox.json enum strings. AnimalStatsModifier confirmed in-game (9_livestock_3.png). Most other dropdowns lack Sandbox_*_option* entries — see annotations for provisional enums flagged _unverified. AnimalMetaStatsModifier exists in Sandbox.json but is NOT shown in the in-game UI — excluded.

groups.label: Crafting & Resources
groups._note: B42-new crafting/resource settings. These 4 keys are absent from Apocalypse.lua (B42-only), so their type and default come entirely from the annotations block above rather than game files.

groups.label: Basements & Darkness
groups._note: B42 basement-related settings. SpawnFrequency is under the Basement nested table in the Lua output — its sandboxKeyMap entry redirects the Sandbox.json lookup to BasementSpawnFrequency. UndergroundDarkness has no Apocalypse.lua entry, so it's fully defined in annotations.
